productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Women Solid Pink Jacket
description: CompositionPink jacket made of velour which combines the stretchy properties of knit with the rich appearance and feel of velvet, has a mock collar, a hood with pink lining, full sleeves, a full length zipper, two side pockets, an elasticated hemline with stitch detailing with a ruched effect and branding embroidered on the left chestFitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeLive life a level above. Made with special care using light fabric and simple cut, this jacket from urban yoga is sure to shield you from the nip in the air. Pair it with track pants and comfortable shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
